name: Universal — Form Submission → Claude-drafted Email Reply

parameters.query: INSERT INTO leads (name, email, company, source_page, brand, message, replied_at, claude_draft) VALUES ('{{$json.name}}', '{{$json.email}}', '{{$json.company}}', '{{$json.source_page}}', '{{$json.brand_name}}', '{{$json.message}}', NOW(), '{{$json.message_draft}}')

_meok_notes.purpose: Receive form submissions from any of the 12 brand sites, draft personalised reply via Claude, send within 60 seconds, log to shared CRM, ping Slack

expected_input_payload.name: form sender's name
expected_input_payload.message: what they wrote in the form

_meok_notes.wire_into_existing_forms: Add `fetch('https://n8n.iokfarm.co.uk/webhook/form-inbound', {method:'POST', body: JSON.stringify(payload)})` in each form submit handler across meok.ai, csoai.org, networknick.co.uk, templeman-opticians.com, etc.
_meok_notes.expected_uplift: 60-second response time vs 24-72h human reply = significantly higher lead conversion rate. Industry benchmark: replying within 5 min vs 1 hour = 21x higher contact rate.
